metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace publishing hive-mind: persistent memory for Claude Code with MCP server, hooks, and slash commands.

plugins.name: hive-mind
plugins.description: Local-first persistent memory + in-loop context for Claude Code. SQLite-backed, MCP-compatible, semantic + FTS5 hybrid search. Validated against LoCoMo at 86.49% same-judge vs Memori (+4.54pp, N=1,540, z=4.64).
